feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Request for Assistance in Accessing Metadata table for Data Integration Monitor in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Could you please assist us in locating the metadata table for the Data Integration Monitor related to flows in SAP Datasphere? (See the attached screenshot of the Reference tab.)

I am currently trying to access the table "SAP_CONTENT$TEC"."REPLICATIONFLOW_RUN_DETAILS" to retrieve replication-related success and failure metadata information. However, I am encountering an "Insufficient Privilege" error.

While there is no immediate business impact from this issue, resolving it will greatly help us in identifying and troubleshooting replication-related issues more effectively. Could you kindly help by assigning the necessary permissions to the "SAP_CONTENT$TEC" schema? Alternatively, if there are other database tables that contain metadata related to replication or data flows (e.g., success, failure, start date, end date, records processed), could you guide us to those?

Your assistance is greatly appreciated.

entry.title: Not able to access Table created in SAP HANA Cloud with Datasphere Replication
entry.content:
Hi team,

We are following a scenario for replicating data from Datasphere to SAP HANA Cloud

Created a Replication scenario in Datasphere for a table "KNA1" . This table is visible in our  container schema after replication as below . There are other tables also created in this container schema through CAPM entity creation.

The below table has no name space attached as it is directly created from Replication

Created a hdb procedure in db/src folder of our CAPM project that access the tables from both CAPM created tables and table created with Data sphere Replication .

but while accessing the tables created through Replication we are getting an issue while deploying .

The file requires "db://KNA1" which is not provided by any file [8212001] (STDERR, APP/TASK/deploy)#
Other tables which are created with CAPM framework has no issue when accessed with procedures but only tables created with a Replication scenario of Datasphere in our schema has the issue.
 
Please let us know if we have missed any thing while accessing these tables.
 
Regards
Prasad

entry.title: Skip Datasphere Log in pop-up screen in SAC
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Is there any possibilty that we can skip Datasphere log in Pop-up screen in SAC? due to that pop-up page our reports loading duration takes longer time. We are login with SSO.

Many thanks in advance!

SAP Datasphere SAP Analytics Cloud SAP Single Sign-On

entry.title: Material Long Text Data Extraction in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi All,

I have a project requirement to extract Material Long text from STXL table to SAP Datasphere by Replication flow. I am using CDS view as source of Datasphere replication flow and looking for suggestions to achieve this requirement in Datasphere or in CDS view.
I have searched in SCN and found function module READ_TEXT can be call in CDS view by using virtual elements but my understanding is virtual elements can only be use for FIORI not for data extraction in Datasphere.

Thanks you.
Alka

entry.title: Managing replication flow Delta load dependency on next subsequent step run
entry.content:
Hi, Currently we are facing load dependency related issues while using delta Transformation flow, Is there a solution or workaround available for the below scenario?

Currently, we can only schedule replication flows based on time intervals (minutes or hours), not at specific times. Also due to this interval next run gets delay by few Minute and within a month it may reach to an hour.
Is it possible to schedule replication flows to run at specific times if not is there a way to have the dependency between the delta replication flow and the other target flow(transformation flow & Data flow) to ensure that the target flow runs only once the replication flow is completed?

entry.title: Datasphere Analytic Model Table
entry.content:
Hi,

Does anyone know what table in the Hana Database of Datasphere stores the Analytic Model measures?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere - Semantic Onboarding - Dimensions / Text View - Usability
entry.content:
Dear Community,
I appreciate the new capability to import semantically-rich objects from your SAP systems. I have a few questions about issues that I noticed while dealing with this.

(1) Technical Name
The picture below shows the result after a successful upload with the option: "Replication Flows to Local Table". In result the automatic naming convention is Remote.{Connection}.{CDS View}. This is a bit irritating because a locale table is created. In case I'm onboarding an view with the option: "Remote Table" the same naming convention is used. 

Well this leads me to fact that the mechanism of Semantic Onboarding does not separate between source type like Remote.{Connection}.{CDS View} or Local.{Connection}.{CDS View}. Additionally, I don't seem to be able to import a view for federation and replication.

What is your recommendation to achieve both integration scenarios via Semantic Onboarding? (Of course, there is the known capability of "Import Remote Table").

(2) Semantic Usage
The picture below shows the result after a successful upload with the option: "Replication Flows to Local Table". The field Semantic Usage shall me indicate how can i use this artefact for. In that case it is of type dimension. 

The picture below shows the result after a successful upload with the option: "Replication Flows to Local Table". As result of semantic onboarding all semantic types were taken over. But the last column is very import for a decent dimension artefact. The different semantic types or associations are made usable for further usage. But this column is empty and loads of warnings appear to this issue.

If I worked with this automatic result, I always had to create an additional dimension view on top. Well, that is certainly relevant for further modeling requirements. But what is your recommendation to use this "Ready to Go" - Feature (Semantic Onboarding)?

Thanks
Nico

entry.title: Max Value highlight with Cross Calculation and Calculated Measure
entry.content: I want to highlight the max value for each calculated measure from period Jan to Dec. NOTE: There are no dimensions in the table. Model is created in Datasphere. Thank you

entry.title: How to implement additional booking periods (More than 12) in SAC and Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi all,

we are currently working on a reporting using SAP Analytics Cloud and SAP Datasphere with data coming from S/4HANA. 

In S/4HANA it is possible to work with additional booking periods (More than the typical 12 month booking periods). We have the requirement to report these additional booking periods using SAP Analytics Cloud and Datasphere. As there is barely any information or blogs regarding this and no standard solution available in SAC/Datasphere, we were wondering if someone worked on a similar solution before or if there are any best practices for this kind of implementation.

Any help is much appreciated!

Best regards

entry.title: How can setup CI/CD pineline with in the tenant (one space to another space)?
entry.content:
Hi,

We are trying to setup the CI/CD pipeline for one space another space in SAP Datasphere.

How to set up that? 

 

 

 

Thanks & Regards,

 

Shravani KETHIREDDY.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Why does the Database User from a SPACE in SAP Datasphere got locked?
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community Experts

I know why I used gets Locked. Usually, it is because the password expired or the wrong password was used to establish the connection.

We are currently using database users for each productive space so we can consume views created in SAP Datasphere on third party applications like Excel or Power BI through an ODBC connection.

My question is if there are logs where I can check which user (person consuming information) or in which application the database user got locked? Or what happened for the user to get locked?

I check audit logs but every result was successful, I couldn't identify when the database user got locked nor why.

I can access SAP HANA Cockpit, but there I don't know where to look for that information, if there is any info on that.

Do you happen to know where can I check?

Thank you

Rebeca

entry.title: DP Agent installation issue - to connect SAP Datasphere to other remote DB sources
entry.content:
I have been trying to install the DP agent to be able to connect the SAP DataSphere to other data sources. 

After the installation in completed when I try to start the DP agent it throws an error that its not an installed service. 

The below are installation logs summary . 

[Summary]Success: Configuring environment

Success: Configuring internal database

Success: Create an event to purge SQLA log files

Success: Creating repositories

Success: Stop internal database
Completed successfully.
16:55:50.577 - INFO:     command exited with value 0

16:55:50.577 - INFO:     sap_ipv6_active =

16:55:50.577 - INFO:     executing _createInstanceFileWin()

16:55:50.577 - INFO:     creating new C:\usr\sap\dataprovagent\agent_instance file

16:55:50.578 - INFO:     executing _installAgentServiceWin()

16:55:50.578 - INFO:     running command: dpagent_servicedaemon_install.bat <DOMAINNAME\USERNAME> <PASSWORD>

16:55:50.578 - INFO:     current working directory: C:/usr/sap/dataprovagent/bin

16:55:50.741 - INFO:     command output:The system cannot find the path specified.
16:55:50.741 - INFO:     command exited with value 65280

16:55:50.741 - INFO:     command failed:

16:55:50.742 - ERR :     Failed to create Windows service for DP Agent as part of the installation.
You can create the Windows service by running this command (replace with correct domain\username, and password):dpagent_servicedaemon_install.bat

entry.title: Remote table not reflecting measures properly in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear SAP colleagues,

We are facing an issue with one remote table in SAP Datasphere which is based on ICJRNLENTRITMDEX CDS View (Consolidation Group Journal Entry Item for Data Extraction).

The issue more exactly is with Amount in Local Currency/Amount in Transaction currency measures, but only for some specific currencies (JPY, VND, NTD). I suspect it might be because of the decimals, even though the same data type was reflected in SAP Datasphere while importing the remote table (DEC 23,2)

The amounts are reduced with 2 zeros. For example, 5.000.000 in source table in S/4 system is getting reflected as 50.000 in SAP Datasphere.

  • SAP Datasphere

  • Source CDS view

The data was replicated as snapshot.

Did anyone else faced this issue or is aware of any KBA?

Any input is welcomed.

Thank you!

entry.title: Is it possible to export Data from Datasphere to MS SQL Server
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am currently working on establishing data transmission between SAP Datasphere and Microsoft SQL Server.

For importing data, I understand that we can configure an MS SQL Server connection directly within Datasphere using the MS SQL Server Log Reader adapter via the Data Provisioning Agent.

However, I am uncertain about how to transmit data from SAP Datasphere to MS SQL Server. Is this functionality supported?

If so, I would greatly appreciate any guidance, such as documentation, blogs, or an explanation of the general concept involved.

Thank you in advance for your assistance!

Best regards,

Marc

entry.title: Datasphere Transport management is terrible, what am I missing?
entry.content:
The longer I am using Datasphere, the more frustrated I become about some design choices and at this point I am wondering if I miss something.

I have a very simple landscape with a dev Datasphera and a prod Datasphere. Most of the time, I want to transport medium sized changes to already existing models and views.

Currently, you can either use packages, where you always have to grab all dependencies but you do have the option to organize all changes into some sort of "unit" or "package" or you do it manually and you might forget to transport a change you made.

So exactly the option that I need the most: Package a few changes into a transport without the entire dependency chain, is missing.

All I need is the ability to create a package without all the dependencies. Very simple! And that is how the transport management works in SAP R3 and R4? What was the reasoning not to do it with Datasphere?

On top of that, the UI is especially slow there. Simply opening the initial dialogue takes 30 seconds.

What it all boils down to is that even minor changes that should be 5 minutes take me 30 minutes because of the clunky and slow implementation. 

But I cannot rule out, that I do something wrong so I am here posing the question if other people see it the same way or if make mistakes.

entry.title: Extraction settings for CDS view to use via Cloud Connector/Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I need to use the standard view for data extraction (Example:I_NOTIFICATION) to Datasphere via Cloud connector.I see that data extraction and delta annotations are missing in this view .Is there any way  to add these settings other than creating another custom view on top that ?We use S/4 HANA On-premise environment.

Thanks & Regards,

Subra

entry.title: VPN between SAP DATASPHERE and AZURE
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

Configuring a VPN between SAP DATASPHERE and AZURE is required as an additional security measure. It is required from AZURE to enter SAP DATASPHERE but when you want to enter DATASPHERE it asks you for a VPN username and password to access the information.

How do I set up a VPN on AZURE to access DATASPHERE?

Best regards.

entry.title: SAP Datsphere TRIAL is not functional anymore
entry.content:
I am registed to SAP Datshpere trial but I do not see any functions avilable to me. Is it just me or anyone else facing the same issue. 

__PRESENT

__PRESENT

entry.title: Unable to extract data from BW Queries to Datasphere
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

I am trying to extracting the data from BW queries to Datasphere, I am getting the below error message. As i checked the Trace (ST01), there is no Auth error in the trace.

2025-01-16 06:46:13,909 [ERROR] [852a8bfd-328d-48e0-a29e-c38d50d7e7e555806] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:13,925 [ERROR] [528b373c-b217-430e-8688-d96956b9e40d47119] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:17,081 [ERROR] [7aa3869f-f332-4c11-b5c8-0ce3be45d60156630] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:17,112 [ERROR] [fa8b6571-ba08-45bb-95f0-7e021f60e6b44750] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,519 [ERROR] [19cc6ece-85fe-4df6-ad39-4a19dee4a83213619] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,566 [ERROR] [446d36ee-cd6f-4db0-90dd-deb3955bed2249536] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,847 [ERROR] [0f546e2b-556e-47aa-b4fa-a998c72419e061835] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:24,894 [ERROR] [675fb19e-9733-43a2-803a-1c3a4555aaa463041] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:46:25,003 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] ABAPAdapter | ABAPAdapter$6.run [] - Error while trying to preload table and description dictionary : com.sap.conn.jco.JCoException: (104) JCO_ERROR_SYSTEM_FAILURE: You do not have authorization for this function (raised by system [QIS|rb3qisa0.server.bosch.com|46]) Message 868 of class SO type E

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] ABAPAdapter | TableLoaderExtractor.checkError [] - Error for "BW"."BEX_QUAERY_NAME" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised.

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] DPFramework | AsyncHandler.processStreamingExecuteStatement [] - AH(41897): Exception while processing request "SDA Response for ABAPAdapter of type SUCCESS_MSG responding to STREAMING_SET_STATEMENT"

2025-01-16 06:47:05,566 [ERROR] [f5c5921d-31b5-4a93-aede-299b12909c857777] DPFramework | AsyncHandler.processStreamingExecuteStatement [] - AH(41897): com.sap.hana.dp.adapter.sdk.AdapterException: Error for "BW"."LSUPCI_600M_SDS_I11" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised. Context: Error for "BW"."LSUPCI_600M_SDS_I11" : Error while accessing Error while extracting from source 6ZTF41N0V8B3IKEBNSOYN14HN (type InfoProvider) An exception was raised.

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.checkError(TableLoaderExtractor.java:954)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.odpFetchNext(TableLoaderExtractor.java:973)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.TableLoaderExtractor.executeStatement(TableLoaderExtractor.java:1583)

                                at com.sap.hana.dp.abapadapter.ABAPAdapter.executeStatemen...

Thanks.

entry.title: Datasphere - Copy objects between Spaces within the same tenant
entry.content:
Hello,

We are planning to use a single Datasphere tenant with multiple spaces designated for DEV, QA, and Production environments. Currently, we have configured connections, replication flows, and views within the "DEV" space, and the tables are populated with data.

Could you please advise on the best approach to copy the objects (excluding data) from the "DEV" space to the "QA" space within the same tenant? The goal is to reconfigure the connections in the "QA" space to point to a different source system and replicate the data accordingly.

Any guidance or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

Thank you!

Hiri
